ns0:entry.ns0:title: CliMA/ClimaAtmos.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaAtmos.jl
Language: julia
ClimaAtmos.jl is an atmosphere model that is designed to leverage data assimilation and machine learning tools for modeling and calibrating subgrid-scale processes.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: CliMA/ClimaCore.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaCore.jl
Language: julia
CliMA model dycore

ns0:entry.ns0:title: CliMA/Oceananigans.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/CliMA/Oceananigans.jl
Language: julia
🌊 Julia software for fast, friendly, flexible, ocean-flavored fluid dynamics on CPUs and GPUs

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ComputationalPsychiatry/ActionModels.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ComputationalPsychiatry/ActionModels.jl
Language: julia
A Julia package for behavioural modeling

ns0:entry.ns0:title: EnzymeAD/Enzyme.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/EnzymeAD/Enzyme.jl
Language: julia
Julia bindings for the Enzyme automatic differentiator

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ITensor/ITensors.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ITensor/ITensors.jl
Language: julia
A Julia library for efficient tensor computations and tensor network calculations. ITensors.jl is supported by the Simons Foundation's Flatiron Institute.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: JuliaGPU/CUDA.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/JuliaGPU/CUDA.jl
Language: julia
CUDA programming in Julia.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: JuliaLang/Pkg.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/JuliaLang/Pkg.jl
Language: julia
Pkg - Package manager for the Julia programming language

ns0:entry.ns0:title: JuliaLang/julia
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/JuliaLang/julia
Language: julia
The Julia Programming Language

ns0:entry.ns0:title: JuliaManifolds/Manifolds.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/JuliaManifolds/Manifolds.jl
Language: julia
Manifolds.jl provides a library of manifolds aiming for an easy-to-use and fast implementation.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: JuliaRegistries/General
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/JuliaRegistries/General
Language: julia
The official registry of general Julia packages

ns0:entry.ns0:title: MakieOrg/Makie.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/MakieOrg/Makie.jl
Language: julia
Interactive data visualizations and plotting in Julia

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Nemocas/Nemo.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Nemocas/Nemo.jl
Language: julia
Julia bindings for the FLINT number theory C library

ns0:entry.ns0:title: SciML/DiffEqBase.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/SciML/DiffEqBase.jl
Language: julia
The lightweight Base library for shared types and functionality for defining differential equation and scientific machine learning (SciML) problems

ns0:entry.ns0:title: SciML/ModelingToolkit.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/SciML/ModelingToolkit.jl
Language: julia
An acausal modeling framework for automatically parallelized scientific machine learning (SciML) in Julia. A computer algebra system for integrated symbolics for physics-informed machine learning and automated transformations of differential equations

ns0:entry.ns0:title: SciML/NonlinearSolve.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/SciML/NonlinearSolve.jl
Language: julia
High-performance and differentiation-enabled nonlinear solvers (Newton methods), bracketed rootfinding (bisection, Falsi), with sparsity and Newton-Krylov support.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: SciML/OrdinaryDiffEq.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/SciML/OrdinaryDiffEq.jl
Language: julia
High performance ordinary differential equation (ODE) and differential-algebraic equation (DAE) solvers, including neural ordinary differential equations (neural ODEs) and scientific machine learning (SciML)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: SciML/SciMLBase.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/SciML/SciMLBase.jl
Language: julia
The Base interface of the SciML ecosystem

ns0:entry.ns0:title: atoptima/Coluna.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/atoptima/Coluna.jl
Language: julia
Branch-and-Price-and-Cut in Julia

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jump-dev/JuMP.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jump-dev/JuMP.jl
Language: julia
Modeling language for Mathematical Optimization (linear, mixed-integer, conic, semidefinite, nonlinear)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jump-dev/MathOptInterface.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jump-dev/MathOptInterface.jl
Language: julia
A data structure for mathematical optimization problems

ns0:entry.ns0:title: oscar-system/Oscar.jl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/oscar-system/Oscar.jl
Language: julia
A comprehensive open source computer algebra system for computations in algebra, geometry, and number theory.
